flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Curry College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Curry College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (48.2% vs 53.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Curry College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
